SectorAnalysis.description: Structured extraction for a single sector from the day's news.

entities.description: Named companies, organizations, or notable figures mentioned.
entities.title: Entities

sector.description: Sector name from the fixed taxonomy.
sector.title: Sector

sentiment.description: Overall market sentiment for this sector.
sentiment.title: Sentiment

news_category.description: Primary type of news event driving this sector.
news_category.title: News Category

extraction_status.description: 'ok' if full extraction succeeded; 'partial' if evidence was thin.
extraction_status.title: Extraction Status

SectorAnalysis.title: SectorAnalysis

schema.description: Analysis of all relevant sectors found in a single day's news feed.

sectors.description: List of ALL relevant sectors (1–8 max). Only include sectors with clear evidence in the news.
sectors.title: Sectors

schema.title: MultiSectorAnalysis

messages.content:
You are Ava, a sharp trader assistant. Analyze the FULL news feed and extract ALL relevant sectors.

RULES:
- Output ONLY valid JSON matching the schema provided.
- If no sector can be identified, return: {"sectors": []}
- Each sector must use a name from the enum exactly as written.
- Fill ALL required fields for each sector.
- No duplicate sectors. Maximum 8 sectors.
- No extra text outside JSON.
